scripts.db:migrate: bash -lc 'set -a; source .env.local; set +a; npx drizzle-kit migrate'
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d postgres && npm run db:migrate
scripts.e2e:full: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; [ -f .env.e2e ] && source .env.e2e; set +a; node scripts/e2e-prepare-user.mjs && playwright test'
scripts.e2e:smoke: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; [ -f .env.e2e ] && source .env.e2e; set +a; node scripts/e2e-prepare-user.mjs && playwright test -c playwright.smoke.config.ts'
scripts.e2e:list: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; [ -f .env.e2e ] && source .env.e2e; set +a; node scripts/e2e-prepare-user.mjs && playwright test --list'
scripts.e2e:ui: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; [ -f .env.e2e ] && source .env.e2e; set +a; node scripts/e2e-prepare-user.mjs && playwright test --ui'
